Slok.a 7: If sun and Saturn are conjoined. the native will have

Slok:a 8: If Moon and Mars are conjoined. the native will be brave.
He wil gain honour in waifa re. and will be proficient in wrestling. He willl

Sloka 9: If Moon and Mercury are conjoined, the native will be
proficient in writing poetry and stories. He will be rid'l and will be liked
by wealthy women. He will have a cheel1ul disposition. He will be good~
looking. He will be righteous and will possess ster1lng character.
